filesModified.purpose: Two changes: (1) Removed !$displayFilters condition from .archive-preset-filters block — now renders whenever presets are active regardless of displayFilters. (2) Added skip logic in .archive-active-filters pill loop to exclude preset terms, so only user-selected (non-preset) terms appear as interactive buttons.

Two changes: (1) In buildButtons(), split values into all-values (for disabling options in the select) and userValues (preset-excluded, for generating interactive pills). Only userValues generate <button> pills in .archive-active-filters. (2) In Clear All handler, after resetting all hidden inputs to empty, restore preset filter values so presets persist through a clear action.
Updated comment from 'displayFilters=false, non-interactive' to 'always non-interactive' to reflect new behavior. No functional CSS changes.

warnings: react-hooks/exhaustive-deps on Archive.tsx — pre-existing, matches pattern in other blocks

syncStatus.notes: Root wrapper mismatch is a pre-existing false positive. All sync checks pass.

testPage.notes: Existing test page variations cover both displayFilters=true and displayFilters=false with presetFilters set. No content changes needed.

fixesApplied.description: Removed !$displayFilters from .archive-preset-filters conditional. Added in_array check in .archive-active-filters loop to skip terms present in $preset_filters[$taxonomy_slug].

buildButtons(): compute userValues = values minus presetFilters[field] entries; disable options for all values but only generate interactive pills for userValues. Clear All handler: after resetting inputs to '', re-populate preset taxonomy inputs from presetFilters so presets persist.
